ast.name: info
ast.source: LogTape loggers are configured.  Note that LogTape itself uses the meta logger, which has category {metaLoggerCategory}.  The meta logger is used to log internal diagnostics such as sink exceptions.  It's recommended to configure the meta logger with a separate sink so that you can easily notice if logging itself fails or is misconfigured.  To turn off this message, configure the meta logger with higher log levels than {dismissLevel}.  See also <https://logtape.org/manual/categories#meta-logger>.
ast.target: LogTape 記錄器已設定。請注意，LogTape 本身使用 meta 記錄器，其類別為 {metaLoggerCategory}。meta 記錄器用於記錄內部診斷資訊（例如接收端異常）。建議為 meta 記錄器設定獨立的接收端（sink），以便在記錄功能本身失敗或設定錯誤時能輕鬆察覺。若要關閉此訊息，請將 meta 記錄器設定為高於 {dismissLevel} 的記錄層級。另請參閱 <https://logtape.org/manual/categories#meta-logger>。

This value comes directly from the storage medium (usually cookies on the server) and may not be authentic. Use supabase.auth.getUser() instead which authenticates the data by contacting the Supabase Auth server.
ast.target: 使用自 supabase.auth.getSession() 或某些 supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() 事件傳回的 user 物件可能不安全！此值直接來自儲存媒介（通常是伺服器上的 Cookie），可能並非真實憑證。請改用 supabase.auth.getUser()，它會透過與 Supabase Auth 伺服器通訊來驗證資料。
